---
title: "Multivariable calculus: Exercises"
toc: true
---

# 24 Integrals in cylindrical and spherical coordinates, part 1

Attempt as many of problems 1-41 odd in [this](./text/24ex-integrals-in-cylindrical-and-spherical-coordinates-part-1.pdf){target="_blank"} file. The solutions are [here](./text/24ex-integrals-in-cylindrical-and-spherical-coordinates-part-1-sol.pdf){target="_blank"}, under the heading Section 16.5.
